violations.text: Spinach & cheese croissants observed held at 59 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the counters, prep units, and ledges in dining room have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2025
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Employee observed filling water container in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer must be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Potatoes and eggs observed held at 74-103 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hot hold unit which had no water in it was filled, and eggs & potatoes were reheated. Discussed 1-keeping hot water at the level of the food in the hot holding unit 2-using deep pans for eggs and potatoes 3-not overfilling pans, and 4-monitoring hot holding temperatures New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Date marking system is inaccurate, with use-by dates of more than 7 days. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Bagels, yogurt parfaits, and orange juice (in cups with lids) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. English Food Label Approval Form English Food Labeling for Packaged Food New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2025

Drainage from espresso machine observed draining into a container in the front area. Drainage from beverage machine observed draining into a container in the kitchen. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on a kitchen counter. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Unwrapped bagels observed in chest freezer. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, and floor mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The slicer was permanently taken out of service for other reasons. Mixer must be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

Milk, oat milk, Italian deli meat, ham, and pork observed held at 48-64 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Date marking system is inaccurate, giving 8 day use-by dates' Food must be used or disposed of after 7 days. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

Sanitizer solution was in excess of recommended parts per million (ppm) Sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

Chemical bottle was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Food observed stored on the floor under a shelf in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Avacados were not washed before being cut. Plant foods must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Equipment and utensils observed on a wet towel after cleaning and sanitizing. Equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the service area, and on a storage shelf in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

The slicer was not in good repair, with an unsealed gap between pieces that impacts its ability to be cleaned and sanitized.Slicer was taken permanently out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:counterunused hot hold unit on counterice binmilk tableplastic cup holdercoffee refrigeratordrive thru window areacoffee syrups areacoffee syrups traytoaster and counterknife rackwalk in cooler shelvesprep tables in kitchen including sides & legsThe chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
The liquid from the espresso unit is draining into the hand sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

The floors and walls (including electrical boxes & junctures) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris.E The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

The inside of the walk in cooler including the fan covers, fan soffit, and ceiling have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

The presence of flies are not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door lo boy have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

The condensate from the Oasis machine and drain line from the expresso machine are draining into a container and front handsink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
